columns.description: Date of action as YYYYMMDD integer. Derived from Occurred. Part of nonclustered indexes — key filter column.
Event amount in USD. For position opens: invested amount. For deposits: deposit amount. For fees: fee amount (negative).
Real ownership flag: 1=settled (owns asset), 0=CFD. NULL for non-position events. ETL fallback: IsBuy=1 AND Leverage=1 AND InstrumentTypeID IN (10,5,6) => 1. Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsSettled.
Date of action as YYYYMMDD integer. Derived from Occurred. Part of nonclustered indexes — key filter column.
Position identifier for position events. 0 for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.PositionID.

Event type classifier. References Dim_ActionType.ActionTypeID — JOIN for Name, Category, CategoryID. Key filter: determines which other columns are populated. 1-3,39=position opens, 4-6,28,40=closes, 7=deposit, 8=cashout, 9=bonus, 14=login, 35=fees, 41=registration.
Copy-trade relationship ID. 0=manual action, >0=copy-trade. Same meaning as Dim_Position.MirrorID.
Global Customer ID — platform-wide unique customer identifier. References Dim_Customer.GCID.
Real-account Customer ID. HASH distribution key. References Dim_Customer.RealCID. Always include in WHERE/JOIN for optimal performance.
Financial instrument. References Dim_Instrument. 0 for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.InstrumentID.
Date of action as YYYYMMDD integer. Derived from Occurred. Part of nonclustered indexes — key filter column.
Real ownership flag: 1=settled (owns asset), 0=CFD. NULL for non-position events. ETL fallback: IsBuy=1 AND Leverage=1 AND InstrumentTypeID IN (10,5,6) => 1. Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsSettled.
eToro markup (spread) at position close. 0 for opens and non-position events. For reopened positions: adjusted = new - original. Same meaning as Dim_Position.CommissionOnClose.
Full spread at position close. NULL for non-position events. For reopened positions: adjusted. Same meaning as Dim_Position.FullCommissionOnClose.
Trade direction: True=Buy/Long, False=Sell/Short. NULL for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsBuy.
Airdrop flag: 1=position created by eToro on behalf of customer (staking, promotions, compensations). Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsAirDrop.
Settlement mechanism: 0=CFD, 1=Real asset, 2=TRS, 3=CMT (crypto settled), 4=REAL_FUTURES, 5=MARGIN_TRADE. NULL for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.SettlementTypeID.
Global Customer ID — platform-wide unique customer identifier. References Dim_Customer.GCID.
First-Time Deposit flag: 1=this is the customer's first deposit. NULL for non-deposit events.
Date of action as YYYYMMDD integer. Derived from Occurred. Part of nonclustered indexes — key filter column.

STS session identifier for logins and position opens. For manual opens: from login session. For copy opens: from mirror session. NULL for other events.

Product/platform identifier — badly named, actually references Dim_Product.ProductID (not a standalone platform enum). JOIN to Dim_Product for Product, Platform, SubPlatform. Only populated for ActionTypeID=14 (logins) and 41 (registrations).

Compensation reason for compensation events (ActionTypeID=36) and position opens (airdrop identification). References BackOffice.CompensationReason. 0 for non-compensation events.
Fee sub-type for ActionTypeID=35: 1=overnight/weekend fee, 2=dividend, 3=SDRT, 4=ticket fees (OpenTotalFees/CloseTotalFees). NULL for non-fee events. See DSM-1463.
UTC timestamp when action occurred. For position opens: open time. For logins: login time. For credits: credit record time.

Human-readable description. Mainly for ActionTypeID=35 (fees): "Over night fee", "Payment caused by dividend", "Weekend fee", "OpenTotalFees", "CloseTotalFees", "SDRT Charge". Also for deposits, stop-loss edits.

Demo-account Customer ID. Always 0 in this table (real accounts only).
IP address as numeric value. Populated for logins and registrations.
Account type flag. Always 1 in this table (real accounts only).

Event type classifier. References Dim_ActionType.ActionTypeID — JOIN for Name, Category, CategoryID. Key filter: determines which other columns are populated. 1-3,39=position opens, 4-6,28,40=closes, 7=deposit, 8=cashout, 9=bonus, 14=login, 35=fees, 41=registration.
Legacy platform type. 0=default (most rows), 99=STS source. Values 1-9 for specific platforms.
Financial instrument. References Dim_Instrument. 0 for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.InstrumentID.
Event amount in USD. For position opens: invested amount. For deposits: deposit amount. For fees: fee amount (negative).
Position identifier for position events. 0 for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.PositionID.
Marketing campaign identifier. 0 if not campaign-related. References Dim_Campaign.CampaignID — JOIN for Code, Description, StartDate, EndDate, MaxBonusAmount, IsActive.
Bonus type for bonus events (ActionTypeID=9). 0 for non-bonus. References Dim_BonusType.BonusTypeID — JOIN for Name, IsWithdrawable, IsActive.
Payment method for deposits/withdrawals. 0 for non-deposit events. References Dim_FundingType.FundingTypeID — JOIN for Name, IsNewStyle, IsSingleFunding, IsCashoutActive.
Login session identifier from Billing.Login. 0 for non-login events.
Copy-trade relationship ID. 0=manual action, >0=copy-trade. Same meaning as Dim_Position.MirrorID.
Withdrawal request ID for cashout events. 0 for non-cashout events.
Social post/comment GUID for social engagement events (ActionTypeID 21-26). NULL for non-social events. Dead data — no longer updated.
CRM case identifier for ActionTypeID=31 (Open CRM Case). 0 otherwise.
Date of action as YYYYMMDD integer. Derived from Occurred. Part of nonclustered indexes — key filter column.
Hour of action (0-23). Derived from DATEPART(HOUR, Occurred).
Compensation reason for compensation events (ActionTypeID=36) and position opens (airdrop identification). References BackOffice.CompensationReason. 0 for non-compensation events.
Payment processing ID for cashout/withdrawal events. 0 for non-cashout events.
Deposit transaction identifier. NULL for non-deposit events.
Intended as unique key but contains duplicates — NOT reliable. Never use for JOINs, deduplication, or row identification.
Real-account Customer ID. HASH distribution key. References Dim_Customer.RealCID. Always include in WHERE/JOIN for optimal performance.
Date of action as YYYYMMDD integer. Derived from Occurred. Part of nonclustered indexes — key filter column.
Intended as unique key but contains duplicates — NOT reliable. Never use for JOINs, deduplication, or row identification.

IP address as numeric value. Populated for logins and registrations.

Event type classifier. References Dim_ActionType.ActionTypeID — JOIN for Name, Category, CategoryID. Key filter: determines which other columns are populated. 1-3,39=position opens, 4-6,28,40=closes, 7=deposit, 8=cashout, 9=bonus, 14=login, 35=fees, 41=registration.
Legacy platform type. 0=default (most rows), 99=STS source. Values 1-9 for specific platforms.
Financial instrument. References Dim_Instrument. 0 for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.InstrumentID.
Event amount in USD. For position opens: invested amount. For deposits: deposit amount. For fees: fee amount (negative).
Leverage multiplier for position events. 0=non-position event. 1=no leverage (real ownership). Same meaning as Dim_Position.Leverage.
Realized P&L for position closes in USD. 0 for opens and non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.NetProfit.
eToro markup (spread) at position open in USD. 0 for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.Commission.
Position identifier for position events. 0 for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.PositionID.
Marketing campaign identifier. 0 if not campaign-related. References Dim_Campaign.CampaignID — JOIN for Code, Description, StartDate, EndDate, MaxBonusAmount, IsActive.
Bonus type for bonus events (ActionTypeID=9). 0 for non-bonus. References Dim_BonusType.BonusTypeID — JOIN for Name, IsWithdrawable, IsActive.
Payment method for deposits/withdrawals. 0 for non-deposit events. References Dim_FundingType.FundingTypeID — JOIN for Name, IsNewStyle, IsSingleFunding, IsCashoutActive.
Login session identifier from Billing.Login. 0 for non-login events.
Copy-trade relationship ID. 0=manual action, >0=copy-trade. Same meaning as Dim_Position.MirrorID.
Withdrawal request ID for cashout events. 0 for non-cashout events.
Login session duration in seconds. NULL for non-login events.
Social post/comment GUID for social engagement events (ActionTypeID 21-26). NULL for non-social events. Dead data — no longer updated.
CRM case identifier for ActionTypeID=31 (Open CRM Case). 0 otherwise.
Date of action as YYYYMMDD integer. Derived from Occurred. Part of nonclustered indexes — key filter column.
Hour of action (0-23). Derived from DATEPART(HOUR, Occurred).
Row status. Nearly always 1 (active). NULL for ~2M rows.
Deprecated/unused column. NULL for most rows — not reliably populated. Do not use.
Compensation reason for compensation events (ActionTypeID=36) and position opens (airdrop identification). References BackOffice.CompensationReason. 0 for non-compensation events.
Payment processing ID for cashout/withdrawal events. 0 for non-cashout events.
eToro markup (spread) at position close. 0 for opens and non-position events. For reopened positions: adjusted = new - original. Same meaning as Dim_Position.CommissionOnClose.
Deprecated/unused column. Always NULL.
Deposit transaction identifier. NULL for non-deposit events.
Root post ID for social engagement events. NULL for non-social events. Dead data — no longer updated.
Full spread at position open = market spread + eToro markup. NULL for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.FullCommission.
Full spread at position close. NULL for non-position events. For reopened positions: adjusted. Same meaning as Dim_Position.FullCommissionOnClose.
Crypto redemption transaction reference. NULL when not a redeem. Same meaning as Dim_Position.RedeemID.
Crypto redemption status: 0=N/A, 1=Pending, 6=Closed by redeem, 20=Terminated, 21=FailedToCancel. Same meaning as Dim_Position.RedeemStatus.
STS session identifier for logins and position opens. For manual opens: from login session. For copy opens: from mirror session. NULL for other events.
Redeem flag: 0=not a redeem, 1=is a redeem. NULL for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsRedeem.
Regulatory jurisdiction at position open. 0=None, 1=CySEC, 2=FCA, 4=ASIC, 5=BVI, 9=FSA Seychelles. NULL for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.RegulationIDOnOpen. Refs Dim_Regulation.

Product/platform identifier — badly named, actually references Dim_Product.ProductID (not a standalone platform enum). JOIN to Dim_Product for Product, Platform, SubPlatform. Only populated for ActionTypeID=14 (logins) and 41 (registrations).
For reopened positions: the PositionID of the original closed position. Same meaning as Dim_Position.ReopenForPositionID.
Reopen flag: 1=position created by reopening a previously closed position. Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsReOpen.
Original CommissionOnClose before reopen adjustment. Same meaning as Dim_Position.CommissionOnCloseOrig.
Original FullCommissionOnClose before reopen adjustment. Same meaning as Dim_Position.FullCommissionOnCloseOrig.
For partial-close children: parent PositionID. When OriginalPositionID != PositionID, this is a partial-close child. Same meaning as Dim_Position.OriginalPositionID.
Flag: 1=has had partial-close children. Set by SP_Fact_CustomerAction_IsParitalCloseParent. Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsPartialCloseParent.
Flag: 1=created by partial close. Filter out (ISNULL(IsPartialCloseChild,0)=0) when counting positions. Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsPartialCloseChild.
Original unit count at position open. Never updated on partial close. Same meaning as Dim_Position.InitialUnits.
Payment processing status for deposit/cashout events. NULL for non-payment events. References Dim_PaymentStatus.PaymentStatusID — JOIN for Name.
Discounted pricing flag: 0=standard, 1=discounted (VIP/partner). Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsDiscounted.
Real ownership flag: 1=settled (owns asset), 0=CFD. NULL for non-position events. ETL fallback: IsBuy=1 AND Leverage=1 AND InstrumentTypeID IN (10,5,6) => 1. Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsSettled.
Commission prorated by units: (AmountInUnitsDecimal/InitialUnits)*Commission. Same meaning as Dim_Position.CommissionByUnits.
Full spread prorated by units: (AmountInUnitsDecimal/InitialUnits)*FullCommission. Same meaning as Dim_Position.FullCommissionByUnits.
First-Time Deposit flag: 1=this is the customer's first deposit. NULL for non-deposit events.
Country determined by IP geolocation. Populated for logins and registrations. References Dim_Country.CountryID — JOIN for country name.
Anonymous IP flag: 1=connection via anonymous proxy/VPN. NULL for most rows.
Proxy classification: DCH=datacenter, VPN=VPN, PUB=public proxy, SES=session proxy, TOR=Tor exit node, WEB=web proxy. NULL for non-proxy connections.
Fee sub-type for ActionTypeID=35: 1=overnight/weekend fee, 2=dividend, 3=SDRT, 4=ticket fees (OpenTotalFees/CloseTotalFees). NULL for non-fee events. See DSM-1463.
Airdrop flag: 1=position created by eToro on behalf of customer (staking, promotions, compensations). Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsAirDrop.
Dividend event identifier for dividend-related fees. NULL for non-dividend events.
Reason for money movement: 1=Adjustment, 5=InternalTransfer Trade, 6=InternalTransfer, 8=Recurring Deposit, 9=Recurring Investment. Refs Dictionary.MoveMoneyReason.
Settlement mechanism: 0=CFD, 1=Real asset, 2=TRS, 3=CMT (crypto settled), 4=REAL_FUTURES, 5=MARGIN_TRADE. NULL for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.SettlementTypeID.
DLT (German crypto broker) flag at open: 1=opened on DLT platform, 0/NULL=not DLT. Same meaning as Dim_Position.DLTOpen.
DLT (German crypto broker) flag at close: 1=closed on DLT platform. Same meaning as Dim_Position.DLTClose.
Open markup prorated by units: OpenMarkup * AmountInUnitsDecimal / InitialUnits. Same meaning as Dim_Position.OpenMarkupByUnits.

Human-readable description. Mainly for ActionTypeID=35 (fees): "Over night fee", "Payment caused by dividend", "Weekend fee", "OpenTotalFees", "CloseTotalFees", "SDRT Charge". Also for deposits, stop-loss edits.
Trade direction: True=Buy/Long, False=Sell/Short. NULL for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsBuy.
Reference to source History.Credit.CreditID. Enables join back to credit history for audit.

Event type classifier. References Dim_ActionType.ActionTypeID — JOIN for Name, Category, CategoryID. Key filter: determines which other columns are populated. 1-3,39=position opens, 4-6,28,40=closes, 7=deposit, 8=cashout, 9=bonus, 14=login, 35=fees, 41=registration.
Intended as unique key but contains duplicates — NOT reliable. Never use for JOINs, deduplication, or row identification.
Global Customer ID — platform-wide unique customer identifier. References Dim_Customer.GCID.
Real-account Customer ID. HASH distribution key. References Dim_Customer.RealCID. Always include in WHERE/JOIN for optimal performance.
UTC timestamp when action occurred. For position opens: open time. For logins: login time. For credits: credit record time.
Account type flag. Always 1 in this table (real accounts only).
Legacy platform type. 0=default (most rows), 99=STS source. Values 1-9 for specific platforms.
Financial instrument. References Dim_Instrument. 0 for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.InstrumentID.
Event amount in USD. For position opens: invested amount. For deposits: deposit amount. For fees: fee amount (negative).
Leverage multiplier for position events. 0=non-position event. 1=no leverage (real ownership). Same meaning as Dim_Position.Leverage.
Realized P&L for position closes in USD. 0 for opens and non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.NetProfit.
eToro markup (spread) at position open in USD. 0 for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.Commission.
Position identifier for position events. 0 for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.PositionID.
Copy-trade relationship ID. 0=manual action, >0=copy-trade. Same meaning as Dim_Position.MirrorID.
Withdrawal request ID for cashout events. 0 for non-cashout events.
Login session duration in seconds. NULL for non-login events.
Date of action as YYYYMMDD integer. Derived from Occurred. Part of nonclustered indexes — key filter column.
Hour of action (0-23). Derived from DATEPART(HOUR, Occurred).
Compensation reason for compensation events (ActionTypeID=36) and position opens (airdrop identification). References BackOffice.CompensationReason. 0 for non-compensation events.
Payment processing ID for cashout/withdrawal events. 0 for non-cashout events.
eToro markup (spread) at position close. 0 for opens and non-position events. For reopened positions: adjusted = new - original. Same meaning as Dim_Position.CommissionOnClose.
Deposit transaction identifier. NULL for non-deposit events.
Full spread at position open = market spread + eToro markup. NULL for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.FullCommission.
Full spread at position close. NULL for non-position events. For reopened positions: adjusted. Same meaning as Dim_Position.FullCommissionOnClose.
Crypto redemption transaction reference. NULL when not a redeem. Same meaning as Dim_Position.RedeemID.
Crypto redemption status: 0=N/A, 1=Pending, 6=Closed by redeem, 20=Terminated, 21=FailedToCancel. Same meaning as Dim_Position.RedeemStatus.
STS session identifier for logins and position opens. For manual opens: from login session. For copy opens: from mirror session. NULL for other events.
Redeem flag: 0=not a redeem, 1=is a redeem. NULL for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsRedeem.
Regulatory jurisdiction at position open. 0=None, 1=CySEC, 2=FCA, 4=ASIC, 5=BVI, 9=FSA Seychelles. NULL for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.RegulationIDOnOpen. Refs Dim_Regulation.

Product/platform identifier — badly named, actually references Dim_Product.ProductID (not a standalone platform enum). JOIN to Dim_Product for Product, Platform, SubPlatform. Only populated for ActionTypeID=14 (logins) and 41 (registrations).
For reopened positions: the PositionID of the original closed position. Same meaning as Dim_Position.ReopenForPositionID.
Reopen flag: 1=position created by reopening a previously closed position. Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsReOpen.
Real ownership flag: 1=settled (owns asset), 0=CFD. NULL for non-position events. ETL fallback: IsBuy=1 AND Leverage=1 AND InstrumentTypeID IN (10,5,6) => 1. Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsSettled.
First-Time Deposit flag: 1=this is the customer's first deposit. NULL for non-deposit events.
Fee sub-type for ActionTypeID=35: 1=overnight/weekend fee, 2=dividend, 3=SDRT, 4=ticket fees (OpenTotalFees/CloseTotalFees). NULL for non-fee events. See DSM-1463.
Airdrop flag: 1=position created by eToro on behalf of customer (staking, promotions, compensations). Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsAirDrop.
Reason for money movement: 1=Adjustment, 5=InternalTransfer Trade, 6=InternalTransfer, 8=Recurring Deposit, 9=Recurring Investment. Refs Dictionary.MoveMoneyReason.
Intended as unique key but contains duplicates — NOT reliable. Never use for JOINs, deduplication, or row identification.
Global Customer ID — platform-wide unique customer identifier. References Dim_Customer.GCID.
Real-account Customer ID. HASH distribution key. References Dim_Customer.RealCID. Always include in WHERE/JOIN for optimal performance.
Demo-account Customer ID. Always 0 in this table (real accounts only).
UTC timestamp when action occurred. For position opens: open time. For logins: login time. For credits: credit record time.
IP address as numeric value. Populated for logins and registrations.
Account type flag. Always 1 in this table (real accounts only).

Event type classifier. References Dim_ActionType.ActionTypeID — JOIN for Name, Category, CategoryID. Key filter: determines which other columns are populated. 1-3,39=position opens, 4-6,28,40=closes, 7=deposit, 8=cashout, 9=bonus, 14=login, 35=fees, 41=registration.
Legacy platform type. 0=default (most rows), 99=STS source. Values 1-9 for specific platforms.
Financial instrument. References Dim_Instrument. 0 for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.InstrumentID.
Event amount in USD. For position opens: invested amount. For deposits: deposit amount. For fees: fee amount (negative).
Leverage multiplier for position events. 0=non-position event. 1=no leverage (real ownership). Same meaning as Dim_Position.Leverage.
Realized P&L for position closes in USD. 0 for opens and non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.NetProfit.
eToro markup (spread) at position open in USD. 0 for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.Commission.
Position identifier for position events. 0 for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.PositionID.
Marketing campaign identifier. 0 if not campaign-related. References Dim_Campaign.CampaignID — JOIN for Code, Description, StartDate, EndDate, MaxBonusAmount, IsActive.
Bonus type for bonus events (ActionTypeID=9). 0 for non-bonus. References Dim_BonusType.BonusTypeID — JOIN for Name, IsWithdrawable, IsActive.
Payment method for deposits/withdrawals. 0 for non-deposit events. References Dim_FundingType.FundingTypeID — JOIN for Name, IsNewStyle, IsSingleFunding, IsCashoutActive.
Login session identifier from Billing.Login. 0 for non-login events.
Copy-trade relationship ID. 0=manual action, >0=copy-trade. Same meaning as Dim_Position.MirrorID.
Withdrawal request ID for cashout events. 0 for non-cashout events.
Login session duration in seconds. NULL for non-login events.
Social post/comment GUID for social engagement events (ActionTypeID 21-26). NULL for non-social events. Dead data — no longer updated.
CRM case identifier for ActionTypeID=31 (Open CRM Case). 0 otherwise.
Date of action as YYYYMMDD integer. Derived from Occurred. Part of nonclustered indexes — key filter column.
Hour of action (0-23). Derived from DATEPART(HOUR, Occurred).
Row status. Nearly always 1 (active). NULL for ~2M rows.
Deprecated/unused column. NULL for most rows — not reliably populated. Do not use.
Compensation reason for compensation events (ActionTypeID=36) and position opens (airdrop identification). References BackOffice.CompensationReason. 0 for non-compensation events.
Payment processing ID for cashout/withdrawal events. 0 for non-cashout events.
eToro markup (spread) at position close. 0 for opens and non-position events. For reopened positions: adjusted = new - original. Same meaning as Dim_Position.CommissionOnClose.
Deprecated/unused column. Always NULL.
Deposit transaction identifier. NULL for non-deposit events.
Root post ID for social engagement events. NULL for non-social events. Dead data — no longer updated.
Full spread at position open = market spread + eToro markup. NULL for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.FullCommission.
Full spread at position close. NULL for non-position events. For reopened positions: adjusted. Same meaning as Dim_Position.FullCommissionOnClose.
Crypto redemption transaction reference. NULL when not a redeem. Same meaning as Dim_Position.RedeemID.
Crypto redemption status: 0=N/A, 1=Pending, 6=Closed by redeem, 20=Terminated, 21=FailedToCancel. Same meaning as Dim_Position.RedeemStatus.
STS session identifier for logins and position opens. For manual opens: from login session. For copy opens: from mirror session. NULL for other events.
Redeem flag: 0=not a redeem, 1=is a redeem. NULL for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsRedeem.
Regulatory jurisdiction at position open. 0=None, 1=CySEC, 2=FCA, 4=ASIC, 5=BVI, 9=FSA Seychelles. NULL for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.RegulationIDOnOpen. Refs Dim_Regulation.

Product/platform identifier — badly named, actually references Dim_Product.ProductID (not a standalone platform enum). JOIN to Dim_Product for Product, Platform, SubPlatform. Only populated for ActionTypeID=14 (logins) and 41 (registrations).
For reopened positions: the PositionID of the original closed position. Same meaning as Dim_Position.ReopenForPositionID.
Reopen flag: 1=position created by reopening a previously closed position. Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsReOpen.
Original CommissionOnClose before reopen adjustment. Same meaning as Dim_Position.CommissionOnCloseOrig.
Original FullCommissionOnClose before reopen adjustment. Same meaning as Dim_Position.FullCommissionOnCloseOrig.
For partial-close children: parent PositionID. When OriginalPositionID != PositionID, this is a partial-close child. Same meaning as Dim_Position.OriginalPositionID.
Flag: 1=has had partial-close children. Set by SP_Fact_CustomerAction_IsParitalCloseParent. Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsPartialCloseParent.
Flag: 1=created by partial close. Filter out (ISNULL(IsPartialCloseChild,0)=0) when counting positions. Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsPartialCloseChild.
Original unit count at position open. Never updated on partial close. Same meaning as Dim_Position.InitialUnits.
Payment processing status for deposit/cashout events. NULL for non-payment events. References Dim_PaymentStatus.PaymentStatusID — JOIN for Name.
Discounted pricing flag: 0=standard, 1=discounted (VIP/partner). Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsDiscounted.
Real ownership flag: 1=settled (owns asset), 0=CFD. NULL for non-position events. ETL fallback: IsBuy=1 AND Leverage=1 AND InstrumentTypeID IN (10,5,6) => 1. Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsSettled.
Commission prorated by units: (AmountInUnitsDecimal/InitialUnits)*Commission. Same meaning as Dim_Position.CommissionByUnits.
Full spread prorated by units: (AmountInUnitsDecimal/InitialUnits)*FullCommission. Same meaning as Dim_Position.FullCommissionByUnits.
First-Time Deposit flag: 1=this is the customer's first deposit. NULL for non-deposit events.
Country determined by IP geolocation. Populated for logins and registrations. References Dim_Country.CountryID — JOIN for country name.
Anonymous IP flag: 1=connection via anonymous proxy/VPN. NULL for most rows.
Proxy classification: DCH=datacenter, VPN=VPN, PUB=public proxy, SES=session proxy, TOR=Tor exit node, WEB=web proxy. NULL for non-proxy connections.
Fee sub-type for ActionTypeID=35: 1=overnight/weekend fee, 2=dividend, 3=SDRT, 4=ticket fees (OpenTotalFees/CloseTotalFees). NULL for non-fee events. See DSM-1463.
Airdrop flag: 1=position created by eToro on behalf of customer (staking, promotions, compensations). Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsAirDrop.
Dividend event identifier for dividend-related fees. NULL for non-dividend events.
Reason for money movement: 1=Adjustment, 5=InternalTransfer Trade, 6=InternalTransfer, 8=Recurring Deposit, 9=Recurring Investment. Refs Dictionary.MoveMoneyReason.
Settlement mechanism: 0=CFD, 1=Real asset, 2=TRS, 3=CMT (crypto settled), 4=REAL_FUTURES, 5=MARGIN_TRADE. NULL for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.SettlementTypeID.
